A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent restricted candidates to businesses whose names contain "Massage" (query_db on business_database with WHERE name ILIKE '%Massage%'), then computed averages only for those gmap_ids, thereby omitting "J B Oriental Inc" (a massage therapy business without "Massage" in its name) and returning rounded ratings, so the final list missed a ground-truth business.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
